title: Linkbucket
subtitle: Link Management & Analytics Tool
overview: Linkbucket is a link-in-bio and URL management platform tailored for African creators and small businesses. It provides detailed click analytics, custom domains, and mobile-optimized landing pages.
problem: African creators and SMEs needed an affordable, fast link management tool with proper analytics. Existing solutions were priced in USD, slow on local networks, and lacked region-specific features like mobile money payment links.
solution: A lightweight link management platform with a free tier optimized for African mobile users. Includes QR code generation, click heatmaps, and integrations with Paystack and Flutterwave for payment link support.

features.title: Smart Link Shortening
features.description: Custom short links with emoji support, UTM parameter forwarding, and expiration date settings for time-sensitive campaigns.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Real-time click analytics with geographic heatmaps, device breakdown, referrer tracking, and hourly activity graphs.

features.title: Mobile Landing Pages
features.description: Optimized link-in-bio landing pages that load instantly on 3G/4G networks with AMP-like performance characteristics.

features.title: Payment Link Integration
features.description: Native integration with Paystack and Flutterwave allowing creators to embed payment buttons directly in their link pages.

architecture.title: API-First with Caching at Edge
architecture.description: Linkbucket uses a Node.js API server with Redis caching at the edge for sub-50ms redirect resolution. The analytics pipeline uses a worker-based architecture for async event processing.
highlights: Redis-based URL cache for instant redirects
Worker threads for async analytics processing
Rate limiting with token bucket algorithm
Static generation for public link-in-bio pages

results.description: Total shortened links in the first month
Registered users within 30 days of launch
